name: Homemade Quick Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups nonfat dry milk, instant OR
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together all dry ingredients.
2. Blend well.
3. Cut in shortening by hand or with a heavy-duty mixer until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal in texture.
4. Transfer to an airtight container; label with date and contents.
5. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 10-12 weeks.
Makes about 13 cups of Homemade Quick Mix.
Variation: Use 4 1/4 cups unbleached flour and 4 1/4 cups whole wheat flour. Increase baking powder to 5 tbsp.
